title: Ruinous
description: A minecraft mod that adds a bunch of stuff, including new mobs (2 bosses), new gear and new structures.
body:
Ruinous is a mod that adds a bunch of stuff to the minecraft world and it is all survival compatible!

This mod requires [GECKOLIB](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) to work!

You should also join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/Sd5HCUEj)!

If you use this mod or its assets in a video/review, credit me! Mod reviews are also very appreciated. You may not port this mod to bedrock or other versions/generators without my premission! You may also not upload it to any other websites or use any assets from the mod without my premission.

Current features:
 -Mobs:

          -Villager Priest: Spawns naturally in priest temples. Cannot attack. You can bribe him using gold, diamonds or emeralds by right clicking on him. Each of these has a different value (Gold = 1, Diamond = 2, Emerald = 3). Then by shift+right clicking you can get an item. The amount donated is visible above his head. Donations: 5-9 = Cleanse, 10-14 = Totem of undying, 15-19 = Bottle of blessing, 20+ = Blessed Cross

          -Cultist: Spawns naturally in cultist camps. Is naturally aggressive.

          -Mortem: Boss. Spawns via ritual. Phase 1: 1 normal attack, 1 ground slam attack. Phase 2: 1 normal attack, 1 ground slam attack, 1 spin attack. Goes into phase 2 when below 50% HP. Drops the Axe of Mortem. Gives you the Death's curse effect when you're near him.

          -Crocodile: Naturally spawns in swamps and mangrove swamps. Passive, but will attack if provoked. Long attack range.

          -Mecha Croc: Boss. Can be spawned by the player via the spawn egg. 1 normal attack, 1 fire breath attack.

          -Gladiator Piglin: Miniboss. Spawns naturally in the crumbling wastelands. 1 normal attack, 1 ground slam attack, 1 fireball attack.

-Items:

          -Bottle of Blessing: Gives you the Blessed effect.

          -Cross: Gives you luck when held. While using: 25% chance to get regeneration 2.

          -Blessed Cross: Gives you luck 2 when held. Strikes a ray at the location of the crosshair.

          -Cursed Ingot: Can be obtained if a Cultist hits you while you are holding a Melted Netherite Ingot

          -Cursed Smithing Template: Dropped by Mortem. Can be used to upgrade netherite equipment to Cursed via the Cursed Ingot.

          -Melted Netherite Ingot: Can be obtained by right-clicking the top of a volcano with a netherite ingot.

          -Crocodile Scale

          -Crocodile Tooth

          -Cursed Equipment

          -Axe of Mortem: Gives you the ability to do a ground slam like Mortem by right clicking on a block.

          -Axe of Mortem (Cursed):Gives you the ability to do a ground slam like Mortem by right clicking on a block. Gives you the ability to do a spin attack like Mortem by shift-right clicking.

          -Crocodile Armor

          -Cultist Hook

-Biomes:

          -Crumbling Wastelands: Generates in the Nether. Has volcanos in it, but only on the Nether roof.

-Structures

          -Priest Temple: Generates in the overworld. Spawns the Priest.

          -Cultist Camp: Generates in plains. Spawns Cultists.

          -Volcano: Spawns in the Crumbling Wastelands

-Effects:

          -Death's Curse: Makes your health drop to 50%. You can not regenerate more than 50% of your health.

          -Blessed: Makes you immune to Death's Curse and Blessed Rays.

          -Stunned: Makes you unable to attack or walk.

-Mechanics:

          -Blessed Ray: Summoned by a Blessed cross. Sends a ray from the sun to the earth, burning and damaging any target (including the summoner).

          -Ritual: Can be started when redstone dust is arranged in a + pattern and has candles on the corners. Can be performed by right clicking on the middle redstone dust, then right clicking again with a Cultist Hook.

Also I know the Mortem attacks are a bit too powerful. I'll probably nerf them in the next update.
